## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this change needed now?

## Linked Issues

- Closes #
- Related to #

## Design Docs Affected

- List the affected docs under `docs/concepts/` or `docs/design/`
- State whether the change is normative, operational, or repository-process only

## Compatibility Impact

- Does this change affect OSC compatibility modes?
- Does it affect strict, legacy-tolerant, or extended behavior?
- If there is no compatibility impact, say so explicitly

## Evidence

- What evidence supports this change?
- Examples: doc alignment, issue analysis, benchmark data, conformance results,
  screenshots, operator review, CI output

## Rollback Plan

- How can this change be reverted or safely disabled?
- What is the last-known-good fallback?

## Checklist

- [ ] I linked the relevant issue(s)
- [ ] I updated the relevant design or planning docs
- [ ] I considered compatibility impact explicitly
- [ ] I included evidence appropriate to the change
- [ ] I documented rollback or fallback behavior
- [ ] I understand final approval from `@ryo-hasegawa-35` is required before merging to `main`
